metadata.title: Insolitus Development — Boutique Development in Los Cabos
metadata.description: A boutique local development company facilitating design & construction in Los Cabos, Mexico.

hero.tagline: Where Vision Meets the Desert & Sea
hero.subtitle: A Boutique Development Company in Los Cabos, Mexico

about.headline: Bespoke Development, Vertically Integrated
about.body: Insolitus is a boutique local development company facilitating design & construction in Los Cabos, Mexico. Our vertical integration generates an important competitive advantage — improved communication, simplified administration, enhanced cooperation and streamlined decision-making. Through our multi-disciplinary team we carry out every aspect of a design or construction project in-house. A bespoke luxury hospitality approach enables our clients to actually enjoy the process of bringing their dream vision into reality.

details.design: We oversee every stage of the design process — from initial concept and schematic design through construction documents and field administration. Our integrated approach ensures the architectural vision remains intact from the first sketch to the final finish, with María Manuel Ponte and Symbiotic Architecture leading design excellence on every project.
details.project: Our project management team coordinates all disciplines, timelines, budgets, and stakeholders from a single point of accountability. We eliminate the communication gaps that typically arise when independent firms try to align around a shared vision. You get one team, one point of contact, and full transparency throughout the life of your project.
details.construction: Led by Alonso Ramírez and Ginax — with 20+ years of track record in Los Cabos and Puerto Vallarta — our construction capability is built around in-house labor, owned equipment, and deep relationships with the best subcontractors in Baja California Sur. We have delivered for Four Seasons, One & Only, Rosewood, St. Regis, and Waldorf Astoria.
details.renovations: We transform existing properties into extraordinary spaces. Whether a branded residence refresh, a boutique hotel renovation, or a private residence reimagined, our team brings the same obsessive attention to detail to renovation projects as to ground-up development — with the added expertise of working within existing structures.
details.permits: Navigating the regulatory landscape in Baja California Sur requires deep local knowledge and established relationships. Our team manages re-zoning applications, construction permits, operating licenses, and ecological impact approvals — turning a typically slow and opaque process into a managed, transparent workflow.

alonso.name: Alonso Ramírez
alonso.bio: 20+ years successful construction track record with an impeccable reputation. Alonso has led the success of Ginax in Los Cabos & Puerto Vallarta, serving the Luxury Private Residences & Hospitality markets. Brands recently assisted: Four Seasons, One & Only, World of Astoria, St. Regis.

manu.name: María Manuel Ponte
manu.bio: Graduated from Faculdade de Arquitectura, Universidade de Coimbra, Portugal. Manu's contemporary style blends natural local materials with sustainable practices. Her work integrates architecture with its surrounding environment, drawing from vernacular traditions while incorporating modern solutions — creating spaces that are environmentally responsive and deeply connected to local culture.

rodrigo.name: Rodrigo Caldeira
rodrigo.bio: Born in Rio de Janeiro, raised in Porto, Portugal. Alumni of École Hôtelière de Lausanne, Switzerland. A results-driven leader with a talent for building high-performance teams. His unique combination of luxury resort experience and real estate development is an unfair competitive advantage. Finance-savvy and adept at trend analysis to adapt proactively to market demands.
